title: GAMBLING - 211info
text: BEND OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES GAMBLING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides gambling addiction counseling, information about treatment and recovery services, and public education about risks associated with gambling. 908 NE 4th Street Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Intake: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: By appointment only (541) 504-9577 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 504-9577 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Deschutes County Services: Gambling Disorder Counseling Specialized Information and Referral * Gambling Issues Subject Specific Public Awareness/Education * Gambling Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
